alternatives_considered: Remove MD immediately (option A) — would have broken downstream projects at the time
Keep MD forever alongside KB — maintenance burden, risk of divergence
content.context: During the KB migration, old MD rule files in rules/ were kept as deprecated fallback so downstream projects that hadn't migrated yet could still boot. Claude Code auto-loaded files from ~/.claude/rules/ at session start via symlinks. The KB bootloader (CLAUDE.md) handled rule loading for projects that had migrated.
content.decision: Migration from MD rules to JSON KB is complete. The old MD rules directory no longer exists. This doc is kept as historical record of the migration decision.
content.outcome: The phased approach worked. MD files served as fallback during transition, then were removed once all projects migrated to JSON KB.
content.status: COMPLETED — MD rules directory removed, all projects now boot from JSON KB via CLAUDE.md bootloader
